title: cyclosorus celebicus
intro: Cyclosorus celebicus, also known as Celestial Maiden's Hair or Lady Fern, is a type of fern species that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus celebicus include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
